main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'improper seating O-ring interconnector Tubo 4 T-02 + brine bypass' literal.

key_signals.justification: Conecta evidencia: caída rechazo localizada T-02 + probe test 4100 vs 380 + post-reinstalación O-rings.

alternatives.justification: 5 alts (membrane defect, permeate header reassembly, biofouling, elastomer degradation).

recommended_action.justification: Isolate T-02 + remove Tube 4 + inspect O-rings + replace + leak test — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide visual inspection física O-rings + extrusion damage — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: si O-rings intactos + seals correctos → switch a membrane defect.
